name: mpoint-vector
description: Vector field drawn at material points. 'value' selects the quantity (velocity, displacement, discharge, fob, velocity-applied); 'draw-as' picks the glyph (arrow/disk/line). The 'meshnode-vector' item draws the same vector quantities at background-grid nodes with an identical keyword set.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Glyph used to draw each vector.
Draw every Nth vector to thin a dense field.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create mpoint-vector value velocity draw-as arrow scale 1.0
plot item create mpoint-vector value displacement by-magnitude on
plot item create meshnode-vector value velocity draw-as arrow
common_usage_patterns.description: Same vectors at the background-grid nodes.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against MPoint 3D 9.
value quantities: discharge, displacement, fob, velocity, velocity-applied.
meshnode-vector shares this exact keyword set (drawn at grid nodes instead of material points).
